item.title: ***CANCELLED*** Parks & Recreation Commission Regular Meeting
item.description: ***CANCELLED*** Parks & Recreation Commission Regular Meeting is scheduled for May 13, 2026 at 4:00 PM at Santa Cruz Meeting Room, 501 Poli St. Ventura, CA 93001. The source did not provide additional background.

item.title: City Council Meeting Scheduled
item.description: City Council Meeting is scheduled for May 12, 2026 at 5:00 PM at City Council Chambers, 501 Poli St., Ventura, CA 93001. The source listing provides the public with the time and location for the Ventura event.

item.description: Director's Hearing - Special Meeting Date is scheduled for May 11, 2026 at 4:00 PM at City Council Chambers, 501 Poli St., Ventura, CA 93001. The source did not provide additional background.

item.description: Arts & Culture Commission Special Meeting is scheduled for May 7, 2026 at 5:00 PM at Santa Cruz Meeting Room, 501 Poli St. Ventura, CA 93001. The source did not provide additional background.

item.title: Westside Community Council
item.description: Westside Community Council is scheduled for May 6, 2026 at 6:30 PM at Ventura, CA 93002. The source listing provides the public with the time and location for the Ventura event.

item.title: Design Review Committee Meeting Scheduled
item.description: Design Review Committee Meeting is scheduled for May 6, 2026 at 5:00 PM at Community Meeting Room, 501 Poli St., 2nd Floor, Ventura, CA 93001. The source listing provides the public with the time and location for the Ventura event.

item.title: Housing Rights Center (HRC) Office Hours Scheduled
item.description: Housing Rights Center (HRC) Office Hours is scheduled for May 5, 2026 at 9:30 AM at Tuesdays: Anacapa Conference Room from 9:30 a.m. – 5:00 p.m. Thursdays: Anacapa Conference Room from 9:30 a.m.

item.title: Measure O Citizens Oversight Committee - Regular Meeting Scheduled
item.description: Measure O Citizens Oversight Committee - Regular Meeting is scheduled for May 4, 2026 at 5:30 PM at Ventura, CA 93002. The source did not provide additional background.
